mapper.sql: id, test_id, part_group_id, section_number, question_number, question_type, answer_mode, question_text, correct_answer, options_json, accepted_answers_json, case_insensitive, ignore_whitespace, ignore_punctuation, display_order, score, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_question ( test_id, part_group_id, section_number, question_number, question_type, answer_mode, question_text, correct_answer, options_json, accepted_answers_json, case_insensitive, ignore_whitespace, ignore_punctuation, display_order, score, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{testId}, #{partGroupId}, #{sectionNumber}, #{questionNumber}, #{questionType}, #{answerMode}, #{questionText}, #{correctAnswer}, #{optionsJson}, #{acceptedAnswersJson}, #{caseInsensitive}, #{ignoreWhitespace}, #{ignorePunctuation}, #{displayOrder}, #{score}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM listening_question WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM listening_question WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM listening_question WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY display_order ASC, question_number ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM listening_question WHERE test_id = #{testId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, question_number ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM listening_question WHERE part_group_id = #{partGroupId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY display_order ASC, question_number ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM listening_question WHERE part_group_id = #{partGroupId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, question_number ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE listening_question SET part_group_id = #{partGroupId}, section_number = #{sectionNumber}, question_number = #{questionNumber}, question_type = #{questionType}, answer_mode = #{answerMode}, question_text = #{questionText}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, options_json = #{optionsJson}, accepted_answers_json = #{acceptedAnswersJson}, case_insensitive = #{caseInsensitive}, ignore_whitespace = #{ignoreWhitespace}, ignore_punctuation = #{ignorePunctuation}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, score = #{score} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE listening_question SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE listening_question SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE listening_question SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE part_group_id = #{partGroupId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE listening_question SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
UPDATE listening_question SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 1
UPDATE listening_question SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE part_group_id = #{partGroupId} AND is_deleted = 1
